hero.title: Recover what was taken. Verify before you trust.
hero.subtitle: We help victims of cryptocurrency fraud open formal cases, verify suspicious platforms, and trace stolen assets — under a transparent regulatory framework.
hero.paragraph: Authoritative blockchain trace analysis, asset recovery, and regulatory compliance for high-net-worth individuals, law firms, and institutions across 180+ jurisdictions.

crossBorder.title: Cross-Border Enforcement Network
crossBorder.paragraph: Financial crime operates without borders. So do we. Our platform integrates directly with regulatory bodies, law enforcement agencies, and financial institutions across 48+ core partner jurisdictions.
crossBorder.treatyDesc: Leveraging mutual legal assistance treaties (MLATs) for swift asset freezing capabilities.
crossBorder.courtDesc: Forensic intelligence packages prepared to the evidentiary standards of international courts.

defaults.q1: How do I file a complaint?
defaults.a1: You can file a complaint by clicking the 'Access Portal' button and entering your case access code. If you're a new user, contact our support team to initiate a case.
defaults.q2: How long does the investigation process take?
defaults.a2: Investigation timelines vary depending on complexity. Most cases receive initial review within 24-48 hours, with full investigations typically completed within 2-4 weeks.
defaults.a3: Yes, absolutely. All information submitted to IBCCF is encrypted and stored securely. We never share personal information without explicit consent.
defaults.q4: What types of fraud can I report?
defaults.a4: You can report cryptocurrency scams, fraudulent exchanges, phishing attempts, Ponzi schemes, and any blockchain-related suspicious activities.
defaults.q5: Can I track my case status?
defaults.a5: Yes, once your case is created, you'll receive a unique access code that allows you to log in and track your case progress in real-time.

newsletter.title: Threat Intelligence Updates
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to receive verified scam alerts, platform compliance changes, and security briefings directly from our analysts.

contact.title: Initiate Contact
contact.paragraph: Our intake personnel are available 24/7 to process urgent incident reports and coordinate with regional task forces.
contact.placeholderDescription: Please describe the incident in detail — what happened, how you were contacted, any wallet addresses or transaction IDs involved.
contact.toastSuccessDesc: Your complaint has been received by our intake team.
contact.toastErrorDesc: Your complaint could not be submitted. Please try again.
